raw.title: Raw State
raw.subtitle: Edit the canonical state.json directly. Saving runs schema validation, renders the new haproxy.cfg, validates it with <0>haproxy -c</0>, and reloads HAProxy via the master socket on success.
raw.noStructuralChanges: No structural changes — saving will only refresh the meta.lastEditedAt timestamp.
raw.applyHint: Applying will re-render <0>haproxy.cfg</0>, validate it with <1>haproxy -c</1>, atomically swap, and reload HAProxy via the master socket. On reload failure the previous cfg is restored and a snapshot is written either way.

snapshot.title: Snapshots
snapshot.description: Every successful Apply writes a timestamped JSON snapshot of state to <0>/data/snapshots/</0>. Restore replays the snapshot through the normal validate → render → reload pipeline (with rollback on failure). Retention: last 50 + one per day for 30 days.
snapshot.empty: No snapshots yet — they accumulate as you save state.
snapshot.confirmBody: This will replace the current state with the snapshot taken <0>{{takenAt}}</0> (<1>{{sha}}</1>) and reload HAProxy. The current state will itself be snapshotted on the next save, so the operation is reversible.

diff.identical: <0>{{leftLabel}}</0> and <1>{{rightLabel}}</1> are identical — clicking Apply wouldn't change the file.

tabTitle.state: Re-render from current state.json (does not apply)
tabTitle.diff: Unified diff: on-disk vs from state (what would change if you Apply)

subtitle.disk: The configuration {{name}} is running right now, read from disk.
subtitle.state: A fresh render from the current state.json. Useful to preview what would be applied next time you save.
subtitle.diff: Unified diff: lines that would change if you click Apply (on-disk → from state).

rendered.applySuccess: State re-applied: {{name}} re-rendered, validated, and reloaded.
rendered.applyTitle: Re-render {{name}} from current state.json, validate, atomically write to disk, and reload {{daemon}}. Useful when state and on-disk cfg have drifted (e.g. after a manual /data/state.json edit).
rendered.title: Rendered {{name}}

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Last 200 recorded operations (state changes, cert renewals, manual reloads). Refreshes every 30 seconds.
